name: Let's Play Dominoes Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift the self-rising flour into a mixing bowl.
3. Cut in the chilled butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Stir in the sugar and zest of the lemon.
5. Mix in the beaten egg to form dough.
6. Turn out the dough onto a floured surface and knead until smooth.
7. Spray two baking sheets with vegetable cooking spray.
8. Roll the dough out on a lightly floured board to a rectangle about 1/4-inch thick.
9. Using a knife, cut into 3 by 1 1/2-inch bars.
10. Using a metal spatula, transfer the bars to the prepared baking sheets.
11. With a knife, mark each cookie crosswise across the center.
12. Arrange chocolate pieces on each cookie to resemble domino dots.
13. Bake for 12-15 minutes until lightly browned at the edges.
14. Cool on the baking sheets for a few minutes before transferring to a cooling rack.
